description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push and pull request events to the master branch and can be triggered manually. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-18.04 environment and skip if the commit message contains 'ci-skip'. It checks out the source tree, displays the GCC version, caches Bazel artifacts, sets up bazelisk, displays the Bazel version, runs Bazel tests with sandbox debug and verbose failures, and applies a caching workaround.
